raw_consumer_statement: This is regarding American Express dispute XXXX. I am sick and tired of this company treating XXXX customers like me as second clsss XXXX  and discriminate against me by constantly reopening my disputes. I have provided all the proof to American Express the damaged items were returned yet they open my chargeback again because they dont believe my evidence because I am XXXX. This is despicable. I am very close to closing my card entirely with them because this treatment is unacceptable.
